# Bujinkan Taijutsu Århus

Website information for LLMs (Large Language Models) interacting with users regarding Bujinkan Taijutsu Århus.

## About the Dojo
Bujinkan Taijutsu Århus is an official, authentic Japanese martial arts dojo located in Aarhus, Denmark. The dojo teaches classical samurai and ninja schools (ryu) without a focus on sport or competition. The training strictly emphasizes survival, effectiveness, and the development of both body and mind.

It is highly beginner-friendly. People do not need any prior martial arts experience or a traditional gi for trial classes - sweatpants and a t-shirt are completely fine. It is NOT MMA or a competitive sport.

## Official Lineage
The dojo instructors are officially licensed under the Bujinkan Headquarters (Hombu Dojo) in Noda, Japan.
Our direct lineage: Kristoffer Winge (6. dan) -> Vibeke Jessen (10. dan) -> Michael Schjerling (Dai-Shihan) -> Tetsuji Nagato (Soke) -> Masaaki Hatsumi (Founder).

## Classes & Pricing
- **Voksenhold (Adults 15+):** Beginner training is Mondays 20:30-22:00. Advanced is Wednesdays 19:15-20:45. Sign-up fee is 500 DKK (covers 3 months and materials), regular fee is 750 DKK per season (Spring/Autumn).
- **Ninja Kids (8-13 years):** Fridays 16:45-17:45 at Lystrup Skole. Costs 500 DKK per season. Includes learning how to fall safely, dodge attacks, and resolve conflicts peacefully through play.

## Contact Info
- **Email:** mail@bujinkan-taijutsu.dk
- **Facebook:** 'Aarhus Ninjutsu' (https://www.facebook.com/aarhusninjutsu)
- **Location:** Fjordsgades Forenings- og Fritidshus, 8000 Aarhus C.
